title: Vicente Fox Presidency Update — Apr 19, 2026
summary: Two new retrospective events added covering Fox's post-presidential commentary in late 2025 and early 2026. In December 2025, Fox gave a Texas Tribune Festival interview reflecting on the 25th anniversary of Mexico's democratic transition and his failed 'whole enchilada' immigration deal with Bush. In January 2026, Fox issued stark warnings about potential US military intervention in Mexico under Trump, invoking the 1985 Kiki Camarena precedent and demanding action from President Sheinbaum — echoing the US-Mexico security dilemma that reshaped his own presidency after 9/11. A new 'Post-Presidential Legacy' timeline era has been added to contextualize these developments.

title: Vicente Fox Presidency Update — Sun Jan 18, 2026
summary: Former President Vicente Fox issues stark warnings about potential US military intervention in Mexico amid escalating pressure from the Trump administration over cartel activity.

title: Vicente Fox Presidency Update — Fri Dec 5, 2025
summary: Former President Vicente Fox participates in a virtual one-on-one interview at the Texas Tribune Festival, reflecting on Mexico-US relations, his collaboration with President George W.
